name: Bahrain
summary: Hosts US Navy 5th Fleet HQ. Hit by Iranian strikes. Bapco (state energy company) declared force majeure. 3 killed. Crowne Plaza Hotel damaged. Critical because 5th Fleet is key to US naval operations in Gulf.

signals.content: Iranian strikes targeted US Navy 5th Fleet HQ in Manama and Crowne Plaza Hotel.
Bahrain's Bapco declared force majeure after waves of Iranian strikes targeted energy installations. 3 people killed.

edges.context: Targeted because it hosts US 5th Fleet. 3 killed. Energy infrastructure damaged.
US Navy 5th Fleet HQ in Manama. Critical for US naval operations in Gulf.
